include_images.title: Include Images
include_images.description: If True, include images in the extraction.

optimize_for_latency.title: Optimize For Latency
optimize_for_latency.description: If True, jobs will be processed with a higher throughput and priority at a higher cost. Defaults to False.

deep_extract.title: Deep Extract
deep_extract.description: If True, use Deep Extract, an agentic extraction mode that iteratively refines its output to achieve near-perfect accuracy. Best for complex documents where accuracy is critical.

citations.description: The citations to use for the extraction.
